title: FC Rebels soar to top position
description: KNYSNA NEWS - FC Rebels continued their...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - FC Rebels continued their impressive start to the 2026 Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional Men's League campaign with a commanding performance at Hornlee Stadium last Saturday.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - FC Rebels continued their impressive start to the 2026 Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional Men's League campaign with a commanding performance at Hornlee Stadium last Saturday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Playing on home soil, the Knysna-based outfit secured two crucial victories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Rebels first stunned league leaders Fast Eleven with a convincing 3-0 victory, showcasing discipline, energy and clinical finishing.","html":"The Rebels first stunned league leaders Fast Eleven with a convincing 3-0 victory, showcasing discipline, energy and clinical finishing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Carrying the same momentum into their second fixture, the Hornlee boys produced a polished display to defeat struggling De Rust United 2-0, making it a perfect home weekend for the hosts.","html":"Carrying the same momentum into their second fixture, the Hornlee boys produced a polished display to defeat struggling De Rust United 2-0, making it a perfect home weekend for the hosts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 13 points from seven matches, FC Rebels have recorded four wins, one draw and two defeats, scoring an impressive 17 goals so far.","html":"With 13 points from seven matches, FC Rebels have recorded four wins, one draw and two defeats, scoring an impressive 17 goals so far."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The team's resurgence marks a significant turnaround from the 2025/26 season, where they narrowly avoided relegation after a difficult campaign.","html":"The team's resurgence marks a significant turnaround from the 2025/26 season, where they narrowly avoided relegation after a difficult campaign."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Head coach Testony Sinclair credited the team's strong home form and passionate supporters for the positive start.","html":"Head coach Testony Sinclair credited the team's strong home form and passionate supporters for the positive start."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The boys were brilliant on the field, and the fans played their role in big numbers. Home-ground advantage has been key for us this season,\" said Sinclair.","html":"\"The boys were brilliant on the field, and the fans played their role in big numbers. Home-ground advantage has been key for us this season,\" said Sinclair."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Results","html":"Results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strikers FC 2-1 Madibaz FC","html":"Strikers FC 2-1 Madibaz FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sea Birds 1-1 Oriented Birds","html":"Sea Birds 1-1 Oriented Birds"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Smuts United 2-0 De Rust United","html":"Smuts United 2-0 De Rust United"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Flying Eagles 2-1 Bitou Young Pirates","html":"Flying Eagles 2-1 Bitou Young Pirates"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC United 2-1 Moonlight","html":"FC United 2-1 Moonlight"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Flying Eagles 0-2 Oriented Birds","html":"Flying Eagles 0-2 Oriented Birds"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strikers 1-2 Black Cats","html":"Strikers 1-2 Black Cats"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sea Birds 3-2 Bitou Young Pirates","html":"Sea Birds 3-2 Bitou Young Pirates"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC United 0-0 Infantry School","html":"FC United 0-0 Infantry School"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC Rebels 3-0 Fast Eleven","html":"FC Rebels 3-0 Fast Eleven"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC Rebels 2-0 De Rust United","html":"FC Rebels 2-0 De Rust United"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"La liga 2-0 Black Cats (walkover)","html":"La liga 2-0 Black Cats (walkover)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voota 3-1 Infantry School","html":"Voota 3-1 Infantry School"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"La liga 2-0 Madibaz Football","html":"La liga 2-0 Madibaz Football"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Smuts United 4-6 Fast Eleven","html":"Smuts United 4-6 Fast Eleven"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voota 1-2 Moonlight","html":"Voota 1-2 Moonlight"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
